Constitution script is visible as texture on the right — adds depth without competing with the headline. Safe and professional. The "We the People" script is faintly readable on the right half, tying the visual to the site's purpose.

More editorial presence — the script texture is clearly intentional at this opacity. The deeper base (#011535) adds sophistication. Verify headline contrast ratio before shipping.

Most dramatic — "We the People" is fully legible on the right. Strong visual tension between the old document and the modern accountability tool. Risk: the script competes visually at this opacity. Works best on large displays.

Mobile — 390px width  ·  Vertical gradient treatment

Freedom Index
Votes Tell the Truth

See how your legislators actually vote. Then share what you find.

Federal State

Mobile flips the gradient to vertical — top of image bleeds through lightly, fades to solid navy behind the content. "We the People" is visible at the top edge on scroll, then the content area is clean. Left/right split doesn't work on mobile — vertical fade is the right call.
